name: marketing-team-freedom
description: A virtual marketing team in a Claude Code plugin — strategist, copywriter, hook-writer, brand-voice guardian, channel-adapter, and orchestrator. Treats marketing as a structured pipeline: positioning → brief → copy → voice-check → channel-adapt → publish → post-mortem. Deliverables are versioned Markdown files, not code. Designed to layer on top of studio for handoff docs, continuous CHANGELOGs, and rollback-as-release.
